findings.title: Underutilized (right-sizing candidate) Virtual Machine
findings.finding_detail: 14-day avg CPU 2.8%, max CPU 9.5% — right-sizing candidate.
findings.remediation: Right-size to a smaller SKU in the same VM family using Azure Advisor / Azure Monitor metrics, or move the workload to Azure Container Apps / Functions if usage is bursty. Validate with a 30-day metrics baseline before resizing production workloads.
findings.estimated_savings: 20-50% of the VM's compute cost

findings.title: Idle Virtual Machine (candidate for deallocation)
findings.finding_detail: 30-day avg CPU 0.4%, minimal network activity while running — idle VM.
findings.remediation: Confirm with the resource owner, then stop/deallocate or delete the VM. If retained for DR/testing, schedule automated start/stop via Azure Automation or the Start/Stop VMs v2 solution.
findings.estimated_savings: Up to 100% of the VM's compute cost while stopped/deallocated

findings.title: Missing Reserved Instance / Savings Plan coverage on steady-state compute
findings.finding_detail: 30-day uptime ratio 98% on pay-as-you-go pricing with no commitment discount.
findings.remediation: Purchase a 1- or 3-year Azure Reservation for the specific VM size/region, or a broader Azure Savings Plan for Compute for flexible coverage across VM families. Use Azure Advisor reservation recommendations to size the commitment against actual usage.
findings.estimated_savings: Up to 65-72% versus pay-as-you-go compute rates

findings.title: Missing Reserved Instance / Savings Plan coverage on steady-state compute
findings.finding_detail: 30-day uptime ratio 99% on pay-as-you-go pricing with no commitment discount.
findings.remediation: Purchase a 1- or 3-year Azure Reservation for the specific VM size/region, or a broader Azure Savings Plan for Compute for flexible coverage across VM families. Use Azure Advisor reservation recommendations to size the commitment against actual usage.
findings.estimated_savings: Up to 65-72% versus pay-as-you-go compute rates

findings.title: Azure SQL / Cosmos DB provisioned throughput far exceeds consumption
findings.finding_detail: 14-day avg provisioned-capacity utilization 14%.
findings.remediation: Move to serverless tier (Azure SQL Database serverless, Cosmos DB serverless/autoscale) or right-size the provisioned tier; enable Cosmos DB autoscale to eliminate manual RU/s guesswork.
findings.estimated_savings: 30-60% of database compute cost

findings.title: Azure Hybrid Benefit not applied to eligible Windows Server / SQL Server workload
findings.finding_detail: Eligible Windows workload without Azure Hybrid Benefit applied (licenseType=None).
findings.remediation: Enable Azure Hybrid Benefit on the VM/SQL resource (licenseType=Windows_Server or Windows_Server_Perpetual) to reuse existing on-prem licenses instead of paying the embedded license cost in the Azure meter.
findings.estimated_savings: Up to 40% on Windows VM cost; up to 55% on SQL Server cost

findings.title: Azure Hybrid Benefit not applied to eligible Windows Server / SQL Server workload
findings.finding_detail: Eligible SQLServer workload without Azure Hybrid Benefit applied (licenseType=LicenseIncluded).
findings.remediation: Enable Azure Hybrid Benefit on the VM/SQL resource (licenseType=Windows_Server or Windows_Server_Perpetual) to reuse existing on-prem licenses instead of paying the embedded license cost in the Azure meter.
findings.estimated_savings: Up to 40% on Windows VM cost; up to 55% on SQL Server cost

findings.title: Unattached Managed Disk
findings.finding_detail: Disk unattached for 45 days.
findings.remediation: Confirm the disk is not held for a pending restore/migration, then snapshot if retention is required and delete the disk, or downgrade to Standard HDD if it must be retained but is rarely accessed.
findings.estimated_savings: 100% of the disk's monthly storage cost if deleted

findings.title: Premium/high-performance disk tier on low-IOPS workload
findings.finding_detail: Premium_LRS disk averaging 90 IOPS against 5000 provisioned.
findings.remediation: Right-size to Standard SSD or Standard HDD, or move to a smaller Premium SSD provisioned-size tier that still meets the observed IOPS/throughput ceiling.
findings.estimated_savings: 40-80% of the disk's monthly cost

findings.title: Storage account without lifecycle management policy
findings.finding_detail: No lifecycle policy; 4500000000000 bytes in hot tier untouched for 30+ days.
findings.remediation: Configure a Lifecycle Management policy to transition blobs to Cool/Cold/Archive tiers based on last-access time, and set expiration rules for temporary or log data.
findings.estimated_savings: up to 50% (Cool), up to 80% (Archive) on tiered data

findings.title: Non-production workload running outside business hours without auto-shutdown
findings.finding_detail: Environment tag 'dev' with no auto-shutdown schedule configured.
findings.remediation: Enable VM auto-shutdown or the Start/Stop VMs v2 automation runbook to power resources down outside business hours; consider Dev/Test pricing subscription offers for eligible workloads.
findings.estimated_savings: ~65% (assuming 12x5 vs 24x7 runtime)

findings.title: App Service Plan over-provisioned relative to app load
findings.finding_detail: 14-day avg CPU 8.5% across 4 static instances, no autoscale.
findings.remediation: Right-size the App Service Plan tier, consolidate low-traffic apps onto a shared plan, and enable autoscale rules instead of a static high instance count.
findings.estimated_savings: 20-40% of App Service Plan cost

findings.title: Missing cost allocation tags (governance / showback-chargeback gap)
findings.finding_detail: Missing required tag(s): CostCenter, Owner, Application.
findings.remediation: Apply required tags directly or via Azure Policy 'Require a tag on resources' with remediation tasks; consider Azure Policy tag inheritance from resource group/subscription to reduce manual tagging burden.
findings.estimated_savings: Not directly cost-reducing; enables accurate allocation and downstream optimization

findings.title: Missing cost allocation tags (governance / showback-chargeback gap)
findings.finding_detail: Missing required tag(s): Owner, Application.
findings.remediation: Apply required tags directly or via Azure Policy 'Require a tag on resources' with remediation tasks; consider Azure Policy tag inheritance from resource group/subscription to reduce manual tagging burden.
findings.estimated_savings: Not directly cost-reducing; enables accurate allocation and downstream optimization

findings.title: Missing cost allocation tags (governance / showback-chargeback gap)
findings.finding_detail: Missing required tag(s): CostCenter, Owner, Environment, Application.
findings.remediation: Apply required tags directly or via Azure Policy 'Require a tag on resources' with remediation tasks; consider Azure Policy tag inheritance from resource group/subscription to reduce manual tagging burden.
findings.estimated_savings: Not directly cost-reducing; enables accurate allocation and downstream optimization

findings.title: Missing cost allocation tags (governance / showback-chargeback gap)
findings.finding_detail: Missing required tag(s): CostCenter, Owner, Application.
findings.remediation: Apply required tags directly or via Azure Policy 'Require a tag on resources' with remediation tasks; consider Azure Policy tag inheritance from resource group/subscription to reduce manual tagging burden.
findings.estimated_savings: Not directly cost-reducing; enables accurate allocation and downstream optimization

findings.title: Autoscale not enabled on Virtual Machine Scale Set with variable load
findings.finding_detail: No autoscale profile with CPU std-dev of 27 over 14 days (variable load).
findings.remediation: Configure autoscale rules based on CPU, memory, or queue-length metrics with appropriate min/max/default instance counts and cooldown periods; consider mixing in Spot instances for stateless, interruptible capacity.
findings.estimated_savings: 20-45% of scale set compute cost

findings.title: Orphaned / unassociated Public IP address
findings.finding_detail: Standard public IP with no associated ipConfiguration.
findings.remediation: Release or delete the public IP if it is no longer required, or re-associate it with the intended resource.
findings.estimated_savings: 100% of the public IP hourly charge

findings.title: Redundant or excessive storage replication tier
findings.finding_detail: Standard_GRS replication with DataCriticality tag = 'low'.
findings.remediation: Downgrade to LRS or ZRS where cross-region redundancy is not a business requirement; confirm against data-residency and DR policies first.
findings.estimated_savings: ~50% of replicated storage cost

findings.title: Log Analytics workspace using Pay-As-You-Go tier without commitment tier evaluation
findings.finding_detail: Sustained 135 GB/day ingestion on Pay-As-You-Go pricing tier.
findings.remediation: Evaluate and switch to the appropriate Log Analytics Commitment Tier that matches sustained ingestion volume; also review verbose diagnostic categories and reduce retention on low-value tables.
findings.estimated_savings: Up to 30% of ingestion cost at qualifying volumes

findings.title: Unused or excess Azure Bastion / VPN Gateway standing infrastructure
findings.finding_detail: Zero Bastion sessions in the last 30 days.
findings.remediation: Deploy Bastion using the Developer SKU for occasional access, or deallocate/delete and re-provision on demand via IaC when access is actually needed.
findings.estimated_savings: Up to 100% of the Bastion hourly charge
